case_title: JOSE ALONSO GRESS VS. EAST BAY STEAM CLEANING, INC., A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF GRESS, JOSE ALONSO HERNANDEZ AS TO DEFENDANT EAST BAY STEAM CLEANING, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
